meaning: adj.[医]产于肝组织,生成肝组织的,肝原性的
examples: Results showed that the hepatogenic diabetes improved in 39 cases (84.8%).
Early effective protection liver function and reasonable nutrition support is the key to prevent the hepatogenic glycometabolism.
To study the clinical features of peptic ulcer of patients with post - hepatitis B cirrhosis, explore the effect of small dose propranolol on the healing of hepatogenic ulcer.
